name: Coral Sleet
brief: Microsoft observed rapid capability growth via AI-assisted iterative development — using AI coding tools to generate, refine and reimplement malware components, agentic AI for an end-to-end lure-development workflow, and jailbroken LLM software to generate malicious code. Microsoft
